jobs.title: Senior Technical Project Manager, Engineering
jobs.jd_full:
A little about us…Fleetio is a modern software platform that helps thousands of organizations worldwide manage their fleet operations. Transportation technology is a hot market, and we’re leading the charge with raving fans and new customers signing up every day. We raised $450M in our Series D funding round in March of 2025 and are on an exciting trajectory as a company. Fleetio is also a proud founding member of the Rails Foundation!

More about our team and company:

  • Fleetio overview video: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=YoXyXTFWbkg
  • Our careers page: https://www.fleetio.com/careers

Fleetio’s Engineering organization is looking for a Senior Technical Project Manager to be the founding project management hire supporting our most strategic technical delivery work. This is a day-zero role: the position does not exist today, and you will be the one to define how world-class project management operates inside our product and engineering organization.

Your primary focus will be supporting our Solutions Engineering capability — a new team that delivers custom technical solutions, integrations, and statements of work for our largest enterprise accounts and most strategic deals. This work is central to Fleetio’s growth strategy: landing our biggest prospects and retaining the customers most important to our business. You will secondarily support our Platform Engineering organization, bringing the same delivery rigor to complex, cross-functional infrastructure and platform initiatives.

Your mandate is project management excellence, executed at a senior level: driving accountability, setting and tracking milestones, managing dependencies, maintaining clear communication plans, and ensuring the projects you run land on time. You will bring your own proven playbook — along with the trust and autonomy to implement it from day one.

If you are an experienced technical project manager who is energized by building from scratch, comfortable operating scrappy while you stand up better systems, and motivated by delivering visible impact for major customers, we would love to connect with you!

This is a remote opportunity and is open to candidates located in the United States, Canada, or Mexico.

More About Our Engineering Team and Company

  • Watch our culture videos: https://fleet.io/culture
  • Engineering culture, interview process and videos: https://www.fleetio.com/careers/engineering
  • Fleetio Go overview video: https://www.fleetio.com/go
  • More about the Fleetio platform: https://www.fleetio.com/features
  • API docs: developer.fleetio.com
  • Test drive Fleetio to get an even better feel for what we’re building: https://www.fleetio.com/register

Who You Are

You are a seasoned technical project manager with a bias for action and an intrinsic motivation to build — even when the environment isn’t perfect yet. You have deep experience delivering in enterprise software organizations, and you pair that with the flexibility and growth mindset to thrive where processes and tooling are still being defined. You run your own discovery, identify what a project needs to succeed, and put it in place.

You are credible in highly technical rooms. Your strength is facilitation: you lead trade-off conversations between engineers and customers, manage technical dependencies with confidence, and translate technical constraints into clear business communication for executives. You build trust quickly across a broad stakeholder base — from individual engineers to executive leadership — and you have a track record of delivering multiple concurrent projects on time, delighting customers along the way.

This role reports to the VP of Engineering.

Your Impact

  • Serve as the founding project manager for the Engineering organization, standing up project cadence, tracking, and reporting practices from day one.
  • Drive delivery of Solutions Engineering projects for our most strategic enterprise accounts — custom plans, integrations, and statement-of-work-based engagements involving internal engineers, external contract engineers, or a blend of both.
  • Facilitate successful statement of work inception: ensure the right people are in the room for scoping, deliverables, estimation, and milestone definition, and hold the project accountable to what was committed.
  • Support Platform Engineering initiatives with the same delivery discipline: milestone tracking, dependency management, risk management, and clear stakeholder communication.
  • Deliver weekly business updates to executive and senior leadership across product and engineering, including the VP of Engineering and directors.
  • Partner closely with Customer Success and Solutions Consulting — the customer-facing owners of day-to-day relationships — to drive clear expectations, well-organized asks, and strong business cases; join customer calls directly when brought in.
  • Establish and maintain a clear communication plan for every project so no stakeholder is left guessing.
  • Assess our project management tooling, work effectively around gaps while they exist, and make recommendations on how to set up our tooling for long-term success (with support teams available for configuration).

Your Experience

  • 7+ years of technical project or program delivery experience, with at least 3 years operating at a senior level.
  • Proven ability to run multiple complex projects in parallel across cross-functional teams.
  • Demonstrable track record of building broad stakeholder alignment and trust from scratch, including regular reporting to and interaction with executive leadership.
  • Experience delivering customer-impacting technical work in enterprise software environments — ideally including professional services, SOW-based, or custom-delivery engagements with repeat clients.
  • Strong technical fluency: able to facilitate architecture and integration trade-off discussions, manage technical dependencies, and hold your own in rooms with senior engineers and technical customer stakeholders.
  • Excellent written and verbal communication, with the ability to tailor project status, risk, and impact to any audience from engineers to executives.
  • A self-directed operating style: you bring established PM best practices with you and implement them through your own discovery, thriving in environments where you get to define how projects are run.

Considered a Plus

  • Hands-on background in software engineering, infrastructure, or architecture.
  • Experience coordinating blended delivery teams (internal engineers + external contractors).
  • Experience supporting platform engineering, SRE, DevOps, or infrastructure organizations.
  • Experience standing up project management practices or tooling in an organization that didn’t have them.
  • Familiarity with fleet, transportation, logistics, or adjacent B2B SaaS domains.

jobs.title: Senior Product Manager, Discovery & Recommendations (Remote)
jobs.jd_full:
ezCater is the #1 food tech platform for workplaces in the US. The company makes it easy for any organization to manage its food needs and order from over 125,000 restaurants nationwide. For workplaces, ezCater provides flexible and scalable solutions for everything from employee meal programs to one-off meetings, all backed by 24⁄7 service and business-grade reliability. For restaurant partners, ezCater helps grow their business by bringing them new high-value customers and large orders.

The Product Management team is looking for an experienced Senior Product Manager to focus on Marketplace Ordering.  In this position, you will own the product strategy and execution for your specific area of the ordering experience, using data and research to develop hypotheses to improve the customer experience.  You will own the KPIs for your area, iteratively experimenting to improve the outcomes in your area.

What You’ll Do:

  • Drive the vision and develop a roadmap for your area of focus.
  • Tell a compelling story using research and data to evangelize the roadmap and vision.
  • Build deep empathy for ezCater users and become their biggest champion.
  • Lead product initiatives and work collaboratively across a cross-functional team including Design, Research, Engineering, Data Analysis, and other Product Managers to define, prioritize, and build new functionalities and improved user experiences.
  • Continuously identify areas for innovation and improvement, and implement strategies to keep us ahead, ensuring our marketplace delivers an unparalleled user experience.
  • Create and monitor the ongoing metrics that measure and define success.
  • Travel to Boston quarterly for planning and business reviews
  • Have fun building impactful software with awesome people.

What You Have:

  • 5+ years of product management experience focused on consumer-facing e-commerce products.  Marketplace experience is a plus.
  • Proven experience innovating on behalf of customers. You’re not just about maintaining the status quo - you strive to understand what customers truly need and find creative solutions.
  • Deep analytic ability, comfort working with and manipulating data, building hypotheses to inform innovative solutions.
  • Strong teamwork and collaboration skills; you’re happy spending much of your day collaborating with team members in different functional areas.
  • Ability to travel up to 5 days per quarter for Together Weeks, team gatherings and other events, when applicable.

The national total targetcash compensation range for this position, including base salary and bonus target, is $161,000–$213,000 annually.*

*Please note: Final offer amounts are determined by multiple factors, including prior experience, expertise and region & may vary from the amount above. This range does not represent additional compensation benefits (such as equity, 401K or medical, dental or vision insurance).

ezCater does not sponsor applicants for work visas or legal permanent residence.

What You’ll Get from Us:

You’ll get a terrifically compelling experience in an innovative, high performing environment. You’ll get to work with engaged and passionate colleagues on challenging and impactful projects. You will have opportunities to grow in your career, and work in a place that values work/life harmony.

Oh, and you’ll get all this: Market competitive salary, stock options that you’ll help make worth a lot, 12 paid holidays, flexible PTO, 401K with ezCater match, health/dental/FSA, long-term disability insurance, mental health and family planning resources, remote-hybrid work from our awesome Boston office OR your home OR a mixture of both home and office, a tremendous amount of responsibility and autonomy, wicked awesome co-workers, employee meal program (and many more goodies) when you’re in our office, and knowing that you helped transform the food for work space.

ezCater is an equal opportunity employer. We embrace humans of every background, appearance, race, religion, color, national origin, gender, gender identity, sexual orientation, age, marital status, veteran status, and disability status. At the same time, we do not employ jerks, even brilliant ones. Following a conditional offer of employment, ezCater may require a background check.

For information on how ezCater collects and uses job applicants’ personal information, please visit our Job Applicant Privacy Policy.
